context_for_next_testing_agent: Comprehensive audit completed. All 5 main tabs working (Tonight, Venues, Wallet, Luna AI, Profile). Key pages tested: Home (FEATURED event, LIVE AUCTIONS, FOR YOU AI section, TRENDING, OUR VENUES), Wallet (20,239 points, Leaderboard, Milestones, Tickets), Luna AI (chat interface with quick actions), Profile (SVG badges, Quick Actions, Settings), Rewards Shop ($25-$150 gift cards), Subscriptions (Bronze FREE, Silver $39.99/mo, Gold), Staff Portal (search + QR scan), Refer Friend, Auctions (ACTIVE auctions with countdown timers), Leaderboard, Venue Detail (Eclipse with Bookings button). Backend APIs: 36/37 passing - auth, venues, events, auctions, leaderboard, rewards, subscriptions, points, referral, birthday, AI chat, payments, perks, notifications, tickets, crews, stories, user, bookings, cherryhub, missions, friends all working.
